changeSet.author: healthdata-system
changeSet.comment: Seed all 56 HEDIS quality measures as CQL library entries for discovery and evaluation

column.name: description
column.value: Adults' Access to Preventive/Ambulatory Health Services

column.value: Weight Assessment and Counseling for Nutrition and Physical Activity for Children/Adolescents

column.value: Statin Therapy for Prevention and Treatment of Cardiovascular Disease

column.value: Use of Imaging Studies for Low Back Pain

column.value: Follow-Up After ED Visit for Alcohol/Drug Use

column.value: Follow-Up After ED Visit for Mental Illness

column.value: Initiation and Engagement of Alcohol and Drug Dependence Treatment

column.value: Use of Multiple Concurrent Antipsychotics in Children and Adolescents
